# NOME: Direttrice 35 (Gallarate - Malpensa - Milano Centrale / Malpensa - Milano Cadorna)
# CAPOLINEA: CADORNA, CENTRALE, GALLARATE, MALPENSA, BOVISA

# SERVIZIO: RE51

2914, 2916, 2918, 2920, 2922, 2924, 2926, 2928, 2930, 2932, 2934, 2936, 2938, 2940, 2942, 2944, 2948, 2950, 2952, 2954, 2956, 2958, 22960, 2962,  2964, 2966, 2968, 2970, 2972, 2974, 2976, 2978, 2980, 2982, 2984, 2986, 2988, 4397

# SERVIZIO: RE54

4301, 4303, 4305, 4307, 303, 305, 80305, 10305, 307, 80307, 10307, 309, 311, 313, 315, 319, 321, 325, 327, 329, 331, 333, 335, 337, 339, 343, 345, 347, 349, 351, 353, 355, 357, 361, 365, 367, 371, 375, 377, 379, 383, 385, 387, 389, 391, 393, 395
